```agda
module ring-theory.ideals-generated-by-subsemirings where
```

## Idea

The {{#concept "ideal generated by a subsemiring" Agda=ideal-Subsemiring}} `S` of
a [semiring](ring-theory.semirings.md) `R` is the least [ideal](ring-theory.ideals-semirings.md) in `R` containing
the [subsemiring](ring-theory.subsemirings.md) `S`. Since subsemirings contain the element `1`, the ideal generated by a subsemiring of `R` is the entire semiring `R`.

## Definitions

### The universal property of ideals generated by a subsemiring

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) (S : Subsemiring l2 R)
  (I : ideal-Semiring l3 R)
  where

  is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring : UUω
  is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring =
    {l : Level} (J : ideal-Semiring l R) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R I J ↔
    ( subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R J)

  contains-subset-is-ideal-generated-Subsemiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring →
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R I
  contains-subset-is-ideal-generated-Subsemiring U =
    forward-implication (U I) (refl-leq-ideal-Semiring R I)

  leq-is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring →
    {l4 : Level} (J : ideal-Semiring l4 R) →
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R J →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R I J
  leq-is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring U J =
    backward-implication (U J)
```

### The universal property of ideals generated by a family of subsemirings

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 l4 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {U : UU l2}
  (S : U → Subsemiring l3 R)
  (I : ideal-Semiring l4 R)
  (H : (α : U) → subset-Subsemiring R (S α) ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R I)
  where

  is-ideal-generated-by-family-Subsemiring : UUω
  is-ideal-generated-by-family-Subsemiring =
    {l : Level} (J : ideal-Semiring l R) →
    ((α : U) → subset-Subsemiring R (S α) ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R J) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R I J
```

### Construction of the Galois connection of ideals generated by subsemirings

#### Ideals generated by subsemirings

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) (S : Subsemiring l2 R)
  where

  subset-ideal-Subsemiring' : type-Semiring R → UU (l1 ⊔ l2)
  subset-ideal-Subsemiring' =
    subset-ideal-subset-Semiring' R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  subset-ideal-Subsemiring : subset-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  subset-ideal-Subsemiring =
    subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-in-ideal-Subsemiring : type-Semiring R → UU (l1 ⊔ l2)
  is-in-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-in-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-prop-is-in-ideal-Subsemiring :
    (r : type-Semiring R) → is-prop (is-in-ideal-Subsemiring r)
  is-prop-is-in-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-prop-is-in-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  type-ideal-Subsemiring : UU (l1 ⊔ l2)
  type-ideal-Subsemiring =
    type-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring :
    type-ideal-Subsemiring → type-Semiring R
  inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring =
    inclusion-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  ap-inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring :
    (x y : type-ideal-Subsemiring) → x ＝ y →
    inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring x ＝
    inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring y
  ap-inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring =
    ap-inclusion-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-in-subset-inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring :
    (y : type-ideal-Subsemiring) →
    is-in-ideal-Subsemiring
      ( inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring y)
  is-in-subset-inclusion-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-in-subset-inclusion-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  contains-zero-ideal-Subsemiring :
    contains-zero-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-Subsemiring
  contains-zero-ideal-Subsemiring =
    contains-zero-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-addition-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-closed-under-addition-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring)
  is-closed-under-addition-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-closed-under-addition-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring)
  is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-closed-under-left-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring)
  is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-closed-under-right-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring)
  is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-Subsemiring R S)

  ideal-Subsemiring : ideal-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  ideal-Subsemiring = ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-Subsemiring : Nonunital-Subsemiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-Subsemiring =
    nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring

  is-ideal-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-ideal-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-Subsemiring
  is-ideal-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-ideal-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring

  is-additive-submonoid-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-additive-submonoid-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-Subsemiring
  is-additive-submonoid-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-additive-submonoid-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring

  additive-submonoid-ideal-Subsemiring :
    Submonoid (l1 ⊔ l2) (additive-monoid-Semiring R)
  additive-submonoid-ideal-Subsemiring =
    additive-submonoid-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring

  contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring :
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Subsemiring
  contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring =
    contains-subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  contains-subset-leq-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l3 : Level} (I : ideal-Semiring l3 R) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring I →
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R I
  contains-subset-leq-ideal-Subsemiring =
    contains-subset-leq-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  contains-linear-combinations-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l3 : Level} (I : ideal-Semiring l3 R) →
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R I →
    (x : linear-combination-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)) →
    is-in-ideal-Semiring R I
      ( ev-linear-combination-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S) x)
  contains-linear-combinations-ideal-Subsemiring =
    contains-linear-combinations-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-Subsemiring R S)

  leq-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l3 : Level} (I : ideal-Semiring l3 R) →
    subset-Subsemiring R S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring R I →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R ideal-Subsemiring I
  leq-ideal-Subsemiring =
    leq-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-ideal-generated-by-subsemiring-ideal-Subsemiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-Subsemiring R S
      ( ideal-Subsemiring)
  is-ideal-generated-by-subsemiring-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-ideal-generated-by-subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {x y : type-Semiring R} → is-in-ideal-Subsemiring x →
    (x ＝ y) → is-in-ideal-Subsemiring y
  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-Subsemiring =
    is-closed-under-eq-ideal-subset-Semiring R (subset-Subsemiring R S)

  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-Subsemiring' :
    {x y : type-Semiring R} → is-in-ideal-Subsemiring y →
    (x ＝ y) → is-in-ideal-Subsemiring x
  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-Subsemiring' =
    is-closed-under-eq-ideal-subset-Semiring' R (subset-Subsemiring R S)
```

#### The subset relation is preserved by generating ideals

```agda
module _
  {l1 : Level} (A : Semiring l1)
  where

  preserves-order-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l2 l3 : Level} (S : Subsemiring l2 A) (T : Subsemiring l3 A) →
    leq-Subsemiring A S T →
    leq-ideal-Semiring A
      ( ideal-Subsemiring A S)
      ( ideal-Subsemiring A T)
  preserves-order-ideal-Subsemiring S T H =
    leq-ideal-Subsemiring A S
      ( ideal-Subsemiring A T)
      ( transitive-leq-subtype
        ( subset-Subsemiring A S)
        ( subset-Subsemiring A T)
        ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring A T)
        ( contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring A T)
        ( H))

  ideal-subsemiring-hom-large-poset-Semiring :
    hom-Large-Poset
      ( λ l2 → l1 ⊔ l2)
      ( Subsemiring-Large-Poset A)
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset A)
  map-hom-Large-Preorder ideal-subsemiring-hom-large-poset-Semiring =
    ideal-Subsemiring A
  preserves-order-hom-Large-Preorder
    ideal-subsemiring-hom-large-poset-Semiring =
    preserves-order-ideal-Subsemiring
```

#### The Galois connection `S ↦ (S)`

```agda
module _
  {l1 : Level} (A : Semiring l1)
  where

  adjoint-relation-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l2 l3 : Level} (S : Subsemiring l2 A) (I : ideal-Semiring l3 A) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring A (ideal-Subsemiring A S) I ↔
    (subset-Subsemiring A S ⊆ subset-ideal-Semiring A I)
  pr1 (adjoint-relation-ideal-Subsemiring S I) H =
    transitive-leq-subtype
      ( subset-Subsemiring A S)
      ( subset-ideal-Subsemiring A S)
      ( subset-ideal-Semiring A I)
      ( H)
      ( contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring A S)
  pr2 (adjoint-relation-ideal-Subsemiring S I) =
    leq-ideal-Subsemiring A S I

  ideal-subsemiring-galois-connection-Semiring :
    galois-connection-Large-Poset
      ( l1 ⊔_) (λ l → l)
      ( Subsemiring-Large-Poset A)
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset A)
  lower-adjoint-galois-connection-Large-Poset
    ideal-subsemiring-galois-connection-Semiring =
    ideal-subsemiring-hom-large-poset-Semiring A
  upper-adjoint-galois-connection-Large-Poset
    ideal-subsemiring-galois-connection-Semiring =
    {!subsemiring-ideal-hom-large-poset-!} -- subset-ideal-hom-large-poset-Semiring A
  adjoint-relation-galois-connection-Large-Poset
    ideal-subsemiring-galois-connection-Semiring =
    adjoint-relation-ideal-Subsemiring
```

#### The reflective Galois connection `S ↦ (S)`

```text
module _
  {l1 : Level} (A : Semiring l1)
  where

  forward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring :
    {l2 : Level} (I : ideal-Semiring l2 A) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring A
      ( ideal-Subsemiring A (subset-ideal-Semiring A I))
      ( I)
  forward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring
    I =
    leq-ideal-Subsemiring A
      ( subset-ideal-Semiring A I)
      ( I)
      ( refl-leq-ideal-Semiring A I)

  backward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring :
    {l2 : Level} (I : ideal-Semiring l2 A) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring A I
      ( ideal-Subsemiring A (subset-ideal-Semiring A I))
  backward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring
    I =
    contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring A
      ( subset-ideal-Semiring A I)

  is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring :
    is-reflective-galois-connection-Large-Poset
      ( powerset-Large-Poset (type-Semiring A))
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset A)
      ( ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring A)
  pr1 (is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring I) =
    forward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring
      I
  pr2 (is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring I) =
    backward-inclusion-is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring
      I

  ideal-subset-reflective-galois-connection-Semiring :
    reflective-galois-connection-Large-Poset
      ( powerset-Large-Poset (type-Semiring A))
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset A)
  galois-connection-reflective-galois-connection-Large-Poset
    ideal-subset-reflective-galois-connection-Semiring =
    ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring A
  is-reflective-reflective-galois-connection-Large-Poset
    ideal-subset-reflective-galois-connection-Semiring =
    is-reflective-ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring
```

### The ideal generated by a family of subsets of a semiring

```text
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {U : UU l2} (S : U → Subsemiring l3 R)
  where

  generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring :
    Subsemiring (l2 ⊔ l3) R
  generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring x =
    union-family-of-subtypes S x

  ideal-family-Subsemiring : ideal-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3) R
  ideal-family-Subsemiring =
    ideal-Subsemiring R
      generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring

  subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring :
    Subsemiring (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3) R
  subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring =
    subset-ideal-Subsemiring R
      generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring

  is-in-ideal-family-Subsemiring :
    type-Semiring R → UU (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3)
  is-in-ideal-family-Subsemiring =
    is-in-ideal-Subsemiring R
      generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring

  contains-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring :
    {α : U} → (S α) ⊆ subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring
  contains-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring {α} x H =
    contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring R
      ( generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring)
      ( x)
      ( unit-trunc-Prop (α , H))

  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-subsets-ideal-family-Subsemiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-Subsemiring R S
      ( ideal-family-Subsemiring)
      ( λ α → contains-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring)
  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-subsets-ideal-family-Subsemiring
    J H =
    leq-ideal-Subsemiring R
      ( generating-subset-ideal-family-Subsemiring)
      ( J)
      ( λ y q →
        apply-universal-property-trunc-Prop q
          ( subset-ideal-Semiring R J y)
          ( λ (α , K) → H α y K))
```

## Properties

### The ideal generated by the underlying subset of an ideal `I` is `I` itself

```text
module _
  {l1 l2 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) (I : ideal-Semiring l2 R)
  where

  cases-forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring :
    (l : linear-combination-Subsemiring R (subset-ideal-Semiring R I)) →
    is-in-ideal-Semiring R I
      ( ev-linear-combination-Subsemiring R (subset-ideal-Semiring R I) l)
  cases-forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring nil =
    contains-zero-ideal-Semiring R I
  cases-forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring
    ( cons (r , (x , H) , u) l) =
    is-closed-under-addition-ideal-Semiring R I
      ( is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-Semiring R I H)
      ( cases-forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring l)

  abstract
    forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring :
      leq-ideal-Semiring R
        ( ideal-Subsemiring R (subset-ideal-Semiring R I))
        ( I)
    forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring x H =
      apply-universal-property-trunc-Prop H
        ( subset-ideal-Semiring R I x)
        ( λ where
          ( l , refl) →
            cases-forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring l)

  backward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring :
    leq-ideal-Semiring R
      ( I)
      ( ideal-Subsemiring R (subset-ideal-Semiring R I))
  backward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring =
    contains-subset-ideal-Subsemiring R
      ( subset-ideal-Semiring R I)

  idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring :
    has-same-elements-ideal-Semiring R
      ( ideal-Subsemiring R (subset-ideal-Semiring R I))
      ( I)
  pr1 (idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring x) =
    forward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring x
  pr2 (idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring x) =
    backward-inclusion-idempotent-ideal-Subsemiring x
```

### The operation `S ↦ (S)` preserves least upper bounds

In
[`ring-theory.joins-ideals-semirings`](ring-theory.joins-ideals-semirings.md)
we will convert this fact to the fact that `S ↦ (S)` preserves joins.

```text
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1)
  {U : UU l2} (S : U → Subsemiring l3 R)
  where

  preserves-least-upper-bounds-ideal-Subsemiring :
    {l4 : Level} (T : Subsemiring l4 R) →
    is-least-upper-bound-family-of-elements-Large-Poset
      ( powerset-Large-Poset (type-Semiring R))
      ( S)
      ( T) →
    is-least-upper-bound-family-of-elements-Large-Poset
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset R)
      ( λ α → ideal-Subsemiring R (S α))
      ( ideal-Subsemiring R T)
  preserves-least-upper-bounds-ideal-Subsemiring =
    preserves-join-lower-adjoint-galois-connection-Large-Poset
      ( powerset-Large-Poset (type-Semiring R))
      ( ideal-Semiring-Large-Poset R)
      ( ideal-subset-galois-connection-Semiring R)
      ( S)
```
